reviews.review_text: We really loved our stay. We booked 2 cottages (a 3 bedroom and a 2 bedroom). The facilities were outstanding and location was perfect - far enough away from town but close enough to get to cafes, restaurants etc. The cottages were very clean, roomy and had all that we needed to have a wonderful time. The booking process and service was excellent - we were given a different cottage to what we originally booked so we could be side by side. It made it much easier for us a group booking. Thank you and highly recommend it. We will definitely book again.

Loved this accommodation for our family of five. Superb location close to everything while still feeling away from it all. Cottage was clean, spacious and well equipped. Michelle and Tom were fantastic hosts. We can’t wait to come back and stay again!!

We just had 5 nights at the beautiful Denmark forest retreat (two adults and two kids). We were in Osprey which is a 2 bedroom cottage. The forest that the property is on is just lovely. So peaceful! The cottages were equipped with everything we needed. A washing machine was very handy and we loved having a fire every night. Michelle and Tom were superb hosts and they had some great recommendations for walks and beach visits that would suit our family. The little touches I loved were having good quality shampoo, conditioner and body wash provided and having a coffee pod machine with nice pods for us to use during our stay. Thanks for having us stay and we will definitely be back again!

Stayed here in March 2026 - 4 adult family members, great location, pre-arrival comms and information was detailed and thought out, everything we needed to enjoy our stay was provided, with the place being clean, tidy and well presented.

Will definitely stay there again if in the Denmark area

Lovely home amongst nature, making it feel secluded whilst still being close to town, the river and walking trails, and not far to drive to beaches. Had all the basics we needed and was great with young kids. A great home base. Michelle and Tom were wonderful and even posted some items we left behind. Would highly recommend!
We absolutely loved our stay here. Beautiful setting, close to town and the beach. Kids loved it too. Very family-friendly and lovely hosts.

Tom and Michelle were just amazing, so accomodating and friendly.

The cottages are so roomy and equipped, I forgot to bring oil, but it was supplied for me, along with washing detergent and a coffee machine 🙌

I have four girls and they just loved it, the country feel is so real here, we will be coming back for sure.

Thank you Denmark forest retreat 🥰

The Denmark Forest Retreat is nestled in bushland but close to town and all the wonderful amenities Denmark has to offer.  Each home is well fitted out and can be rented singly with excellent privacy, or they can be rented all together by large family or friend groups.   Michelle and Tom were very responsive and welcoming. Highly recommended!

We had a week at Denmark Forest Retreat and it was wonderful, what a beautiful relaxing place to stay. The Cottage we stayed in was very well equipped with everything we needed. It was spotless clean and very peaceful. There are great beaches near by, and great bush walks. The town centre is only a 5min drive with coffee shops, restaurants and shops. The owners are very friendly and did everything to make our holiday enjoyable. Thanks Michelle and Tom. xxx
A beautiful setting in the bush. Comfortable and clean. Very relaxing.
Beautiful place in the forest. Had a warm welcome from Tom andMichelle which set the tone for a really lovely stay. Very peaceful place to stay and you feel really connected to nature.

Fabulous, peaceful, homely!!!
Slice of paradise, with all the comforts you could want, super welcoming hosts who go above and beyond! Comfy beds, awesome shower +++ We were over the moon with our stay at Denmark Forest Retreat - thank you Jason & Melissa
Awesome place, clean and cosy!

Absolutely beautiful setting to stay in, peaceful and plenty of space for the kids to run around.
Cottage is well equipped with all your cooking needs, caretakers are just a call away if anything is needed etc.
Will definitely stay here again 😊
This was a lovely place to stay, everything was very clean and well equipped, nice surroundings and only 5 minute drive to town, would definitely stay there again

We stayed for 5 nights with our 11 year old and 8 year old in Cowrie Cottage and it was great. It was very clean, comfortable, and had lovely views of the forest from every window. My kids enjoyed the bunk beds, as well as exploring the property and the dam.
Although there are 5 cottages, our cottage felt quite private and we never heard any other guests. It was quite cold and wet when we were visiting, but the log fire and reverse cycle aircon kept us warm. Although it feels like you are in the bush, it's only 5 minutes drive into Denmark.
The hosts Melissa and Jason were lovely and very welcoming.
They provided everything we needed - plenty of tea/coffee bags, a bit of oil for cooking, wood for the fire, even some laundry powder. The washing machine and airing rack were very handy and the kitchen was well equipped with all appliances we needed. There were also some books, games and DVDs in the cottage, which were handy.
I would definitely recommend Denmark Forest Retreat and we would stay here again.

We really enjoyed our stay here. The accommodation is clean and comfortable. Nice sense of privacy, in the bush & next to a small lake. Close to town, with the option of a cycling/walking path to get there. The owners were very friendly and helpful. Highly recommended!
We enjoyed our stay, it was probably a bit closer to the road than we would have liked. We were surprised that there were not more birds around.

Lovely, cosy and quiet. Our hosts Jason and Melissa gave us great tips on things to do and ensured we had everything we needed. The location is perfect - close to town, the inlet and beach but feels like you're in the bush. Thank you so much we had a wonderful stay!

Love this place! It felt like you're one with nature while being safe and comfy in Driftwood cottage.
Our hosts said hello to our group on our first day, made us feel welcome and gave us helpful tips. Highly recommended! 👍🥰

Great place to stay in Denmark. Beautiful cabin  great for us 2 sisters and child 11 years. Only down side no WiFi for the child but that can also be a good thing. So much to do, tree top walk and Green Pool were my favourites
Lovely and beautiful place.

Excellent accommodation and surrounds and perfectly situated for easy access to beaches, forests and townsite.

Really appreciated the disability provisions in the Nautilus Cottage.

We stayed here again, so good! Such an amazing place to stay, we absolutely loved it. The forest setting was very tranquil and beautiful, we loved the kangaroos. We loved the cottage, was very warm and cosy and we had everything we need. We loved the big TV and the dvds were very useful for the kids. The cottage was perfect for us.
Beautiful cottages in middle of forest. Had a wonderful 3 nights stay.. cottage was very well maintained.

Beautiful accommodation in Denmark. The owners personally came by and gave us awesome suggestions for our stay. They give you some local insights you might otherwise miss. The place was clean, beds were comfy and kitchen had what we needed to cook our dinners. Beautiful location, very serene and tranquil. Would definitely recommend.
Good service & very friendly
Great relaxing stay

Beautiful bush location but still only short drive to town and beach.
House was absolutely lovely and had everything we needed.
Very serene and even had kangaroos visit.
Will be booking again.
Thank you Jason and Melissa.

We booked the holiday home for the first week of the December,  five months before for the ten of us (all cousins) to stay for the 5 nights. The holiday home had everything for us. The best place for relaxing, exploring and indeed living with the serenity of the nature.

I recommend this place if you want to explore places nearby such as Albany Wind Farm, Green Pool & Elephant Rocks, The Gap & Natural Bridge, Giant tree top Walk, Granite skywalk, and much more to mention few.

Most importantly, the hosts were so helpful and responsive. They pop in to say hi. Moreover, they help you give some tips about the best places in the locality if you are new to the place.

It was overall, Best indeed.
Lovely well appointed accommodation. Roomy, Quiet bush setting. Beds were great. Proprietors very helpful.
Our second time here and once again really lovely. Hosts extremely helpful, cottage clean and tidy, and the location is just perfect. thank you

We had originally only booked a 3 night stay. However due to a logistical hiccup with the subsequent accommodation we had also booked for our road trip, our best solution was to double the length of our stay at Denmark Forest Retreat. And what good luck that turned out to be! Put simply, we were very pleased indeed with the chalet, it's location and the town of Denmark itself. We were also charmed by regular visits from a female kangaroo with a well developed joey in her pouch. She seemed quite comfortable with us provided we didn't approach any closer than 3 metres. The wildflowers on the property and in nearby National Parks were a real treat. As for the owners, Jason and Melissa, they turned out to be exceptional hosts who really saved our bacon when our rental car broke down out in the boondocks. It's a whole story in itself but suffice to say that we shall never forget their prompt, pro-active and amazing generosity in rescuing us under very difficult circumstances just moments before sunset. And whilst staying in Denmark, don't miss visiting "Pepper & Salt Restaurant" just out of town for a truly superb fine dining experience. We were very, very impressed.

Our family of 3 generations recently stayed at Driftwood. This house was perfect for our stay and accommodated us all very comfortably. Would highly recommend for a family stay and we all hope to return.

We thoroughly enjoyed our visit to Denmark at our Stay at Denmark Forest Retreat. Fantastic location, just out of town but you feel like you're in the middle of nowhere. Everything we needed was in the cottage and it was warm and comfortable. We hope to visit again one day.
